definition: The strategy that decides where a new order is written after a reorder — ephemeral (session only), localStorage, or written back to the source. Distinct from the validation Commit Policy, which governs when form field edits are written.
usage: The commit dimension of the Reorder Intent, surfaced by the Reorderable List block's withCommitStrategy trait behind the cancelable reorder-commit event. Defaults to ephemeral.
